name: Picture Lamp Metal Bronze - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Enhance the visual appeal of your favorite paintings or photos with this Picture Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Made of metal, this sleek picture lamp projects the light onto your wall decor, accentuating its appearance. It comes with a non-removable integrated bulb with a one-way setting that can be turned on and off by the included remote control for ease of use and requires hardwired installation.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
